TRIM-specific operational extension: Flags cases where the cue type itself remains the dominant unresolved converter after more specific loci are excluded.
current evidential status: provisional reserved value; no positive demo example in the cited manual lineage
open validity question: Can coders distinguish cue-family uncertainty from operation and warrant decisions without project-lead intervention?

closest existing conceptual lineage: argumentation theory; warrant analysis; source criticism; epistemic authority

open validity question: When does an interpretive act grant warranting standing rather than merely operate on already warranted evidence?

closest existing conceptual lineage: argumentation theory; defeasible reasoning; discourse conflict; warrant comparison

TRIM-specific operational extension: Records whose perspective, witness role, testimonial position, or narrative standpoint determines the function.
